name: yggdrasil
description: One shared, durable memory for your AI coding agents — local-first, zero-dependency.

interface.shortDescription: Durable, local-first memory for your coding agents — zero-dependency, no API key.
interface.longDescription: Yggdrasil gives your coding agents a durable, cross-session, cross-project memory of your own work — decisions, lessons, project status. Local-first (SQLite + FTS5), zero external dependencies, runs entirely on your machine. The engine lazy-starts on first use, so there is nothing to configure.
defaultPrompt: Recall what we already decided about this project before I start.
Have I solved something like this in another project before?
Remember this decision and the reasoning for future sessions.
